allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\('@solana/spl-account-compression'\); const src = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./node_modules/@solana/spl-account-compression/dist/cjs/index.js','utf8'\); const match = src.match\(/rightMost[^;]{0,200}/g\); console.log\(match ? match.slice\(0,3\).join\('\\n'\) : 'none'\)")
